channel.title: Game Changer
channel.description: Latest releases from Game Changer on Dropout.tv

item.title: Behind the Scenes of "Rulette"
item.description:
A behind the scenes look at Game Changer's "Rulette."

Duration: 12:58

Tags: Game Changer, sam reich, rules, challenges, game shows, competitions, improv, surprises, not like the other, mad skills, unscripted, paul robalino, ryan creamer, sam geer, johnny-louise nute, ash kron, justin cyrul, chloe badner, nico romero

item.title: Rulette
item.description:
Oscar, Anna, and Jeremy must follow the rules they spin from the wheel.

Duration: 46:49

Tags: Game Changer, sam reich, rules, challenges, game shows, competitions, improv, surprises, not like the other, mad skills, unscripted, oscar montoya, anna garcia, jeremy culhane, ash kron, nico romero, paul robalino, behind the scenes

item.title: Behind the Scenes of "One and Done"
item.description:
A behind the scenes look at Game Changer's "One and Done."

Tags: Game Changer, sam reich, rules, challenges, game shows, competitions, improv, surprises, not like the other, mad skills, unscripted, paul robalino, ash kron, nico romero, ryan creamer, kevin stiller, sam geer, jazzy collins, chloe badner, behind the scenes
